3328580.name: Planes of Fear
3328580.description:
Planes of Fear – The Ultimate Test of Your Courage!

Dive into an intense psychological horror game that pushes you and your friends to the brink of your fears. Whether as a gripping single-player experience or the highlight of your next party, every round transports you into a constantly changing, nightmarish world where your darkest phobias come to life.

Gameplay Highlights:

  • Dynamic Roquelite System:
    The new Roquelite system ensures constant variety: it dynamically adjusts levels to match your skill, making them sometimes harder, sometimes easier, and opening up a continuous progression of new difficulty levels. This way, every round remains unique and challenges you over and over again.

  • Diverse Levels of Fear:
    Each environment is inspired by a specific phobia—be it claustrophobic confinement, unyielding darkness, or the vertigo of dizzying heights. The thematically tuned, intuitive mechanics give you no breathing space, testing your mental endurance.

  • Innovative Multiplayer Mode:
    Connect your Android device via local Wi-Fi and experience a completely new multiplayer adventure! In couch co-op mode, you take turns facing your fears—a perfect challenge for a brave session at your next party. The game creates surprising moments: it randomly selects a time when you can trigger a jump scare from your smartphone—unnoticed, yet with full force. But be warned: an unexpected shock might soon befall you when your fellow players take their revenge!

  • Immersive Sound Design:
    Eerie melodies, whispering voices, and the distant echo of threatening footsteps enhance the atmosphere and give you goosebumps in every scene.

Face the paths of fear, master unpredictable challenges, and discover who has the courage to hold on until the very end. Are you ready to confront your fears?
3328580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
